mapper.insert: insert into area (name, sort, status, description, seat_count, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user) values (#{name}, #{sort}, #{status}, #{description}, #{seatCount}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{createUser}, #{updateUser})
mapper.select:
select * from area
and name like concat('%', #{name}, '%')
order by sort asc, create_time desc
